name: ESPORTS ENTERTAINMENT GROUP, INC.
business: Esports Entertainment Group, Inc. is a diversified operator of iGaming, traditional sports betting and esports businesses. The company operates in two verticals: EEG iGaming (esports betting platform with full casino functionality) and EEG Games (LAN center management software and esports content). It serves customers in over 180 jurisdictions, primarily through its Lucky Dino online casinos and GGC platform.

exposures.sentence: The Company is a diversified operator of iGaming, traditional sports betting and esports businesses with a global footprint.
